title: Trailblazers of Octant Episode 4 — Greenpill Dev Guild
summary: Crypto Altruists episode with Afo, Coi, and Matt from the Greenpill Dev Guild discussing regenerative tools, public-goods funding, and Octant.
description: This is one of the strongest public Dev Guild proof sources because it documents the Octant Community Fund grant and the guild's role in scaling regenerative web3 coordination tools.
author: Crypto Altruists

card.title: Trailblazers of Octant: Greenpill Dev Guild
